series_metadata.series_title: Ohio Lottery Game Show Drawing / Contestant Paperwork and Game Boards
series_metadata.series_description: 1) Contestant Drum Log - Used to record names of potential contestants. 2) Contestant Call Log - Used to record information from initial contact with contestant. 3) Contestant Log - Lists name, address, city, state, ticket number and show date. Used to record type of identification contestant is using as proof of their identity. 4) Alternate Log - Used to record the number of alternates, which are picked to be used if one of the original eight (8) is invalid. 5) Stand-In Log - Used to record information of stand-in if actual contestant does not appear to play. 6) Contestant Packets - Contains copy of Claim Form, Release for Errors Form, Acknowledgement of Rules Form, Stand-In Forms, if applicable, and Joint Ownership Forms, if applicable. Packets are kept for each contestant on the show. 7) Contestant Prize Log - Used to report dollar value of each contestants’ winnings on a given show. 8) Selling Agent Report- Used to record location of where the Ohio Lottery Game Show contestant ticket was purchased. 9) Game Boards – Semi-Final Game Board, which contains hard copy of location of dollar values, double cards and bonus cards for game number 1 and number 2 of each show. Championship Game Board, which contains positions of names in the Championship Game of each show.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: hard copy in operating area two (2) year
